title: KeybindsPurger
description: Unset all keybinds for a clean slate
body:
# KeybindsPurger

KeybindsPurger is a small utility mod that allows you to unset all keybinds in a category, all categories or non vanilla categories. That's it

# Usage

The mod will add a few buttons. On the left side of a categorie's name in the keybinds menu, there are two buttons, "x" will purge the category and "r" will reset it. There also are two buttons on the bottom left side of the screen.
"A" will unset ALL keybinds while "M" will only target modded keybinds

# Why?

When starting a new modpack, I tend to unset all keybinds and only configure them when I need them. It is simpler that way for me so I thought that more people could use a mod that makes this task easier
